visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women are seated in a living room, smiling brightly while holding large octagonal Care Bears x CASETiFY gift boxes. One woman has long dark hair and a beige top, the other wears a white MLB cap and a striped shirt. (2) The woman in the cap opens her purple box, revealing a plush Share Bear, a smaller bear-shaped pouch, a phone case, and stickers. She points to the bear's embroidered lollipop belly. (3) The long-haired woman opens her blue box, showcasing a Grumpy Bear plush and a beaded phone charm with a star-shaped ornament. She handles a blue blind box. (4) Both women hold up their transparent phone cases which feature circular inserts of a white dog's photo. They gesture enthusiastically toward the camera. (5) They open blind boxes to reveal small bear figures. When the long-haired woman pulls a glittery pink bear, they both scream with joy, and the woman in the cap kisses the other's cheek in celebration.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 竟然抽到隱藏. [Logo]: Care Bears x CASETiFY. (2) [Subtitle]: 我收到的是分享熊. [Variety]: 分享熊. (3) [Subtitle]: 我收到生氣熊熊. [Variety]: 生氣熊熊. (4) [Subtitle]: 愛分享的阿寶有一個分享熊熊. (5) [Subtitle]: 超可愛耳機包. (6) [Subtitle]: 我最愛抽盲盒了. (7) [Subtitle]: 貼爆妹妹的額頭. (8) [Subtitle]: 這個手機鏈好漂亮啊. (9) [Subtitle]: 歡慶慶祝手機殼. (10) [Subtitle]: 竟然中隱藏.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 female creators appearing throughout the unboxing.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman with long black hair in a taupe long-sleeved shirt; another woman with a white NY baseball cap and a light blue and white striped collared shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern indoor living room with a brown leather couch, various toys in a transparent bin, and soft warm lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female voices introduce the unboxing over a bright, synth-driven pop BGM with a strong four-on-the-floor beat. (2) Vocal pitch increases as they open the purple set; a soft 'pop' SFX punctuates the reveal of the small earphone case. (3) The sound of plastic rustling accompanies the blue box unboxing; voices become overlapping and more animated with frequent high-pitched exclamations. (4) Rapid speech density as they describe the custom dog photos on the phone cases; BGM remains constant but energetic. (5) An explosive increase in vocal arousal and volume occurs when the 'hidden' figure is pulled, culminating in loud cheering and a distinct 'smack' sound of a kiss on the cheek.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Intro -> Detailed Showcase -> Surprise Reveal -> Emotional Climax
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the Care Bears collaboration with CASETiFY through a high-energy unboxing experience that emphasizes the variety and cuteness of the products.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product packaging and features with focused unboxing commentary.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social-media unboxing tropes including high-energy delivery and colorful subtitles to drive engagement.
